title: Unconditional
html: (intro 2x) D9 C9 Dm/F G/B D9 C9 I changed the view Dm/F G/B From below so your eyes can see D9 C9 I tried to speak Dm/F G/B But the words, you could not hear D9 C9 Through my only son Dm/F G/B I touched the world to change your life within D9 C9 Dm/F G/B I'm at the door, go on, let me in D9 Am7 Em I believe in you D9 Hear my voice Am7 I am here right now F9 C D9 My love is unconditional D9 C9 Dm/F G/B I want the sun to shine again, a start of a new day D9 C9 Dm/F G/B Let my light shine, my ways be your ways this time D9 C9 Dm/F G/B I will always be here for you, waiting for you D9 C9 Dm/F G/B I will not let go, cause I want to show, your heart is mine D9 Am7 Em I believe in you D9 Hear my voice Am7 I am here right now F9 C D9 My love is unconditional D Bm How long will it take? A C The cross, the proof I gave D Bm I paid the price for you A C Receive me, amazing love you take D9 Am7 Em I believe in you D9 Hear my voice Am7 I am here right now F9 C D9 My love is unconditional...
